capabilities.failure.load.description: The downloaded interface could not start. Your chat and saved data are unchanged.
capabilities.failure.load.error: The downloaded interface could not be loaded.
capabilities.failure.load.title: {{name}} didn't load
capabilities.failure.runtime.description: The downloaded interface hit an error. Your chat and saved data are unchanged.
capabilities.failure.runtime.title: {{name}} stopped

connections.mediaSources.atlas.imageDesc: Generate images across Atlas Cloud's hosted model catalog.
connections.mediaSources.atlas.name: Atlas Cloud
connections.mediaSources.atlas.videoDefa: Connection-scoped defaults for Atlas Cloud asynchronous video generation.
These values are sent to Atlas Cloud's asynchronous media API. Model limits vary, so keep the selected model's documentation in mind.
connections.mediaSources.atlas.videoDesc: Generate text-to-video and image-to-video with Atlas Cloud's hosted models.
game.input.onArrival: What do you do when you arrive?
home.achievements.loadError: Achievements could not be loaded right now.
home.achievements.lockedDescription: Unlock this achievement to reveal its title and badge.
home.achievements.profileSummary: {{unlocked}} of {{total}} achievements unlocked in this profile.
home.achievements.title: Achievements
home.credits.contributorsDescription: Synced from the Marinara Engine GitHub contributors list.
home.credits.thirdPartyAssetsDescription: The tracker panel d20 icon uses the path geometry from <0>Font Awesome Free 5.15.4 dice-d20</0> by Fonticons, Inc., licensed under <1>CC BY 4.0</1>. The path formatting was adapted for React; the geometry is unchanged.
home.professorMari.noPreviousChats: No previous Professor Mari chats yet.
navigation.chatSidebar.empty.filtered.co: No conversations match the current filters
navigation.chatSidebar.empty.filtered.ga: No games match the current filters
navigation.chatSidebar.empty.filtered.ro: No roleplays match the current filters
onboarding.agents.body: Agents add optional features without making the base app heavy. Open Download Agents here to browse and install image and video generation, trackers, writers, maps, audio and video calls, and various chat games, then enable the ones you want for each chat. You can update or uninstall them from the same catalog.
onboarding.cardBrowser.body: The Card Browser lets you find and import downloadable character cards. Start here when you want new characters to add to your library.
onboarding.characters.body: Characters are who your AI is going to play or speak as. Create them, edit their descriptions, dialogue examples, organize them into folders, or make them pretty (I can also create those for you).
onboarding.chats.body: Now let's open the Chats tab. This is where your Conversations, Roleplays, and Games live. You can create new chats, switch between them, and manage them here.
onboarding.connections.body: Connections are the first thing to set up before chatting. Add your provider, model, endpoint, and API key here, so you can chat with your AI.
onboarding.conversation.body: Conversation mode is like chatting via DMs or groups on Discord. Use it for general texting with your characters. Mind that they have their lives, can trade selfies with you and even message you on their own!
onboarding.conversation.title: Conversation Mode
onboarding.finish.body: I'm available from the Home page whenever you need help, and my starter chips can guide you through common first steps without making you type everything. For your first real step, set up a Connection. After that, try creating a new chat. Don't worry, I will be there to guide you. Thank you for trying Marinara Engine. Have fun, and please report bugs or rough edges through our Discord or GitHub so we can keep improving it.
onboarding.finish.title: You're All Set!
onboarding.game.body: Game mode turns the chat into a cinematic RPG-style adventure with an AI Game Master. Sit back and enjoy the game, having party members, goals, maps, dice rolls, session history, journals, combat, and custom HUD widgets.
onboarding.game.title: Game Mode
onboarding.lorebooks.body: Lorebooks hold compendiums about worlds, memories, rules, locations, and extra character details. Entries trigger when their keys appear, giving the model extra context only when it matters (and saving your wallet from sending 200k tokens each turn).
onboarding.migration.body: If you have characters, chats, or presets from SillyTavern, open Settings and use the Import tab. I can bring those files in so you do not have to rebuild your library by hand.
onboarding.migration.title: Migrating from SillyTavern?
onboarding.noodle.body: Noodle is a fake social media website where you can see invited characters of your choice interacting with each other, posting about their lives, sharing photos, and discussing your latest chats! You can participate too: like and follow them, and share your hot noodles with them. The timeline can update automatically if you choose. To set it up, head to Settings inside the Noodle tab first.
onboarding.personas.body: Personas define who you are in a chat. Give yourself a name, avatar, description, scenario details, and pretty colors, so characters know who they are speaking to.
onboarding.presets.body: Presets control prompt structure. They're templates that build what the model receives and in what order. If you're new to prompt engineering, you can leave this alone for now and use the default preset (or download one from the community).
onboarding.roleplay.body: Roleplay mode is for roleplaying scenes and immersive stories. It supports richer narration, lorebooks, agents, long-time memory systems, author's notes, trackers, and co-writing controls.
onboarding.roleplay.title: Roleplay Mode
onboarding.settings.body: Settings control the whole app: appearance, behavior, imports, themes, image defaults, notifications, data tools, and other global preferences.
onboarding.welcome.body: Hi! I'm Professor Mari, your assistant and guide! First time around? Allow me to show you around. This is a quick orientation tour, so you can skip it if you already know your way around, but skipping will make me sad a little.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to Marinara Engine!
search.folder.title: Search in folder
settings.actions.resetAppearance: Reset all Appearance settings to Marinara defaults
settings.application.androidStatusBar.er: The Android app could not change the status bar.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.he: Shows Android's time, battery level, and notification icons above Marinara. Turn it off for the distraction-free fullscreen view.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.un: Available in the Marinara Engine Android app.
settings.application.androidStatusBar.up: Update the Marinara Engine Android APK to use this setting.
settings.application.description: Language, safety confirmations, achievements, music, and playful extras.
settings.application.intro: Core app behavior, ordered from daily controls to mode-specific tuning.
settings.application.language.fallback: If a translation is missing, Marinara displays the English text.
settings.application.language.help: Choose the interface language. This changes Marinara's controls and guidance, not model prompts or chat content.
settings.application.language.label: Language
settings.application.title: App Behavior
settings.controls.accentColor.label: Accent Color
settings.controls.accentPulse.help: Animates the selected Accent Color. Solid colors gently brighten and darken; gradients cycle through their selected colors. Custom CSS themes can also request it with --marinara-theme-accent-pulse: enabled. Reduced-motion preferences are respected.
settings.controls.accentPulse.label: Accent Pulse
settings.controls.achievements.help: Shows the Home achievements button and unlock notifications. Tracking stays silent in the current profile when this is off.
settings.controls.achievements.label: Achievements
settings.controls.alwaysShowDockedThough: When Thought display mode is Docked, every featured character's thought stays visible inside the tracker card instead of waiting for the per-card thought button.
settings.controls.backgroundColor.label: Background Color
settings.controls.backgroundGeneration.h: Used for Roleplay and Game generated scene backgrounds.
settings.controls.boldDialogue.help: When on, text inside dialogue quotation marks ("like this", 「like this」, or 『like this』) is bolded in addition to its dialogue highlight color. Turn it off to keep the color without bold.
settings.controls.boldDialogue.label: Bold dialogue in quotes
settings.controls.confirmBeforeDelete.he: Shows a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting chats, characters, or other items. Recommended to keep on.
settings.controls.convertLatex.help: Turns common model-written LaTeX commands like \rightarrow, \neq, \times, and \alpha into regular symbols while leaving code snippets alone. This is display-only; saved messages keep their original text.
settings.controls.convertLatex.label: Convert LaTeX symbols
settings.controls.customPointer.help: Uses Marinara's accent-colored cursor across the app. Turn this off to use the system cursor or let a custom CSS theme control cursor styles.
settings.controls.customPointer.label: Custom Mouse Pointer
settings.controls.debugMode.help: Logs the prompt and response payloads sent to the model in the server console for debugging.
settings.controls.debugMode.label: Debug mode
settings.controls.doubleClickEdit.help: When on, double-click or double-tap a Roleplay message to open it for editing. Turn it off to avoid accidental edits; edit buttons and keyboard shortcuts still work.
settings.controls.doubleClickEdit.label: Double-click edits messages
settings.controls.enableStreaming.help: When on, AI responses appear word-by-word as they're generated. When off, the full response appears at once after completion.
settings.controls.enableStreaming.label: Enable streaming
settings.controls.gameInstantText.help: When enabled, Game mode narration segments appear fully as soon as you enter them. This skips the typewriter effect and hides the narration speed control.
settings.controls.gameInstantText.label: Instantly reveal game text
settings.controls.gameMouseNavigation.he: In Game mode, scroll the mouse wheel up to step back through past assistant turns and down to step forward. Clicking the scene background acts like the Next button. While reviewing the past, Next becomes Return — clicking the background or pressing Return jumps you back to where you were reading.
settings.controls.gameTextEffects.help: Animates dramatic words, ALL CAPS emphasis, parenthetical asides, and explicit text-effect tags in Game mode. Turn this off for plain, stable text.
settings.controls.gameTextEffects.label: Game text effects
settings.controls.guideGenerations.help: Uses the current draft as direction when regenerating a message or manually triggering a character response.
settings.controls.guideGenerations.label: Guide swipes/regens with chat input
settings.controls.illustrations.help: Used for Illustrator agent images saved to chat galleries, including comic pages and scene illustrations.
settings.controls.illustrations.label: Illustrations
settings.controls.includeReasoning.help: Includes saved hidden thinking/reasoning metadata in JSONL and text chat exports. Keep this off when sharing transcripts.
settings.controls.includeReasoning.label: Include reasoning in exports
settings.controls.intuitiveSwipes.help: In Conversation and Roleplay modes, use Left/Right Arrow on desktop or horizontal touch swipes on mobile to move between alternate generations on the latest assistant message.
settings.controls.intuitiveSwipes.label: Intuitive swipe navigation
settings.controls.messagesPerPage.help: How many messages to load at a time. Click 'Load More' in the chat to see older messages. Set to 0 to load all messages at once.
settings.controls.messagesPerPage.label: Messages per page
settings.controls.miniMari.help: Allows the rare Chibi Professor Mari message to appear while scrolling. Turn this off if it gets in the way of settings or other workflows.
settings.controls.miniMari.label: Mini Mari surprise visits
settings.controls.musicPlayer.help: Shows the compact Music Player. Switch between Spotify, YouTube, and Custom from the player itself or the Music DJ agent settings.
settings.controls.musicPlayer.label: Music Player
settings.controls.panelBackground.label: Panel background
settings.controls.portraits.help: Used for generated character and NPC portraits.
settings.controls.portraits.label: Portraits
settings.controls.professorMariSuggestio: Shows Professor Mari's quick suggestion chips and guided option chips after her replies. Turning this off keeps normal chat input unchanged.
settings.controls.queueMedia.help: Sends supported image and video generation jobs one at a time per connection. Keep this on for providers that reject simultaneous requests.
settings.controls.queueMedia.label: Queue media generation requests
settings.controls.quoteStyle.help: Choose how straight and smart quotation marks are unified in chat inputs and displayed AI output.
settings.controls.quoteStyle.label: Quote style
settings.controls.rainbowAccent.help: Cycles the app accent through Marinara's rainbow palette while enabled. Your saved Accent Color stays unchanged. Reduced-motion preferences are respected.
settings.controls.reducedPaintEffects.he: Flattens costly Roleplay transparency, shadows, and scene overlays to keep navigation responsive, especially in Firefox. Applies immediately in every browser.
settings.controls.replaceTrackerIcons.he: Hides the old world/player tracker icon strip so the Tracker panel can dock to the edge. The Agents button stays visible.
settings.controls.rerollLatest.help: When intuitive swipes are enabled, pressing Right Arrow or swiping left on the newest swipe of the latest assistant message creates a new reroll.
settings.controls.rerollLatest.label: Reroll past the newest swipe
settings.controls.reviewMediaPrompts.hel: Pauses supported user-started media generation so you can review and edit the final prompt before provider submission. This applies across Game and Roleplay images, Conversation Gallery selfies, Gallery Video and Animate actions, manual Noodle refreshes, avatars, portraits, sprites, and animated expressions. Unattended automatic generations continue without waiting for a modal.
settings.controls.scrollableAvatars.help: When enabled, roleplay avatars stay visible while you scroll through long messages and stop at the bottom of their own message.
settings.controls.selfies.help: Default selfie canvas for Roleplay and Conversation image commands when a chat does not override selfie resolution.
settings.controls.selfies.label: Selfies
settings.controls.sendOnEnter.help: Choose which chat modes send on Enter. When off, Enter creates a new line and you have to press the send button manually.
settings.controls.sendOnEnter.label: Send on Enter
settings.controls.showMessageNumbers.hel: Displays message numbers in roleplay and conversation chats.
settings.controls.showModelName.help: Displays which AI model generated each response, shown as a small label on assistant messages.
settings.controls.showModelName.label: Show model name on messages
settings.controls.showTimestamps.help: Displays the date and time each message was sent next to it in the chat.
settings.controls.showTimestamps.label: Show message timestamps
settings.controls.showTokenUsage.help: Displays prompt and completion token counts on each AI message. Useful for monitoring context size and cost.
settings.controls.showTokenUsage.label: Show token usage on messages
settings.controls.speechToText.help: When on, chat input bars show a microphone button for browser dictation. Handy still works independently by pasting into the focused input field.
settings.controls.speechToText.label: Speech-to-text microphone
settings.controls.streamingSpeed.help: How fast streaming tokens appear on screen. Lower values give a slower typewriter effect so you can read along. Higher values show text almost instantly.
settings.controls.streamingSpeed.label: Streaming speed
settings.controls.trimIncomplete.help: When on, Marinara trims a trailing unfinished sentence from AI responses before saving the message. It leaves complete responses and command-only endings alone.
settings.controls.trimIncomplete.label: Trim incomplete model endings
settings.controls.upArrowEdit.help: In Conversation and Roleplay modes, press Up Arrow while the chat input is empty to open the most recent message in the chat for editing — whether it's yours or the AI's.
settings.controls.upArrowEdit.label: Up Arrow edits last message
settings.controls.useExpressionSprites.h: When on, tracker portraits can switch to Expression Engine sprites if that agent is enabled for the chat and the character has matching sprite images.
settings.controls.useExpressionSprites.l: Use expression sprites for tracker portraits
settings.controls.weatherEffects.label: Dynamic weather effects (rain, snow, fog, etc.)
settings.externalExtensions.description: Import third-party code only after both safety gates are enabled. Every extension starts disabled.
settings.externalExtensions.disabled: External Extensions are locked and all external code is stopped.
settings.externalExtensions.empty.descri: Importing never runs code. Review every file and approve its exact hash before enabling it.
settings.externalExtensions.empty.title: No External Extensions imported
settings.externalExtensions.enabled: External Extensions are available in Addons. Imported code remains disabled.
settings.externalExtensions.error: External Extensions could not be updated.
settings.externalExtensions.formats.desc: Import .zip, .json, .css, .js, .mjs, .cjs, or .server.js packages. Older Marinara extension manifests are accepted for recovery, but their enabled value is ignored.
settings.externalExtensions.intro: Third-party code is isolated and remains disabled until you approve its exact hash.
settings.externalExtensions.safety: External Extensions cannot enable themselves. Imports, manual records, and code changes remain disabled until you review and approve the exact hash.
settings.externalExtensions.title: External Extensions
settings.externalExtensions.toggle.help: Allows the External Extensions section to appear in Addons. Imported code still requires exact-hash approval.
settings.externalExtensions.toggle.label: Allow third-party extension imports
settings.externalExtensions.toggle.locke: Locked by the server. Set ENABLE_EXTERNAL_EXTENSIONS=true in .env first.
settings.externalExtensions.warning: Third-party extensions may contain malicious or dangerous code. Always inspect every line of code before downloading, importing, or enabling it. You proceed entirely at your own responsibility.
settings.notifications.background.descri: Show a private operating-system notification when an autonomous Conversation message arrives while Marinara is not focused. Message content is hidden.
settings.notifications.background.title: Background Notifications
settings.notifications.completion.descri: Show a private operating-system notification when a reply you started manually finishes in Conversation, Roleplay, Visual Novel, or Game mode while Marinara is not focused. Message content is hidden.
settings.notifications.completion.title: Generation Completion Notifications
settings.notifications.customSound.descr: Used by the existing notification sound switches on every device connected to this server.
settings.notifications.customSound.forma: MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A/MP4, or WebM · up to 10 MB · included in backups
settings.notifications.customSound.label: Custom sound
settings.notifications.customSound.toast: Could not remove the custom notification sound.
Notification sound must be 10 MB or smaller.
Could not save the custom notification sound.
settings.notifications.sounds.descriptio: Play a notification ping when you receive a new message while on a different chat.
settings.notifications.sounds.title: Notification Sounds
settings.personalExtensions.approval.bro: Enable "{{name}}" at hash {{hash}}? Its browser code runs in an opaque-origin iframe without access to Marinara's DOM, origin data, or network. It receives only private extension storage, logging, and managed timers.
settings.personalExtensions.approval.ser: Enable "{{name}}" at hash {{hash}}? Its server JavaScript runs in a separate OS-sandboxed process without access to Marinara or user files, the network, inherited server secrets, child processes, workers, or native addons. It receives only private extension storage, logging, and managed timers.
settings.personalExtensions.empty.descri: Ask Professor Mari to create an extension for you. Nothing runs until you enable it and approve the exact code hash.
settings.personalExtensions.safety: Only Professor Mari can create Personal Extensions. They cannot enable themselves, and every code change requires your approval of a new exact hash.
settings.personalExtensions.sandbox.brow: Browser code runs in an opaque-origin iframe without Marinara DOM, origin, or network access. Review the exact code and hash before enabling.
settings.personalExtensions.sandbox.serv: Server code runs in a separate, permission-restricted OS sandbox. Unsupported platforms refuse to run it. Review the exact code and hash before enabling.
settings.prompts.image.description: Edit the templates used by image, sprite, Game, and prompt-builder systems.
settings.prompts.image.help: Global templates for registered prompt builders, including Conversation selfies, Game NPC portraits, scene media, storyboard prompts, and other registered builders.
settings.prompts.image.title: Image Generation Prompt Overrides
settings.prompts.video.description: Edit reusable templates for Game/Gallery scene videos, Conversation Call character clips, and animated Expression portraits.
settings.prompts.video.help: Game scene videos use this before sending a reference-image video request. Conversation Call clips use the selected character avatar as the identity reference and return to idle at the end of each clip. Animated Expression portraits become looping GIF sprites.
settings.prompts.video.title: Video Generation Prompt Overrides
settings.quickReplies.description: Adds alternate draft actions beside Send. One action appears directly; multiple actions open from the ellipsis.
settings.quickReplies.enable: Enable Quick replies to configure options
settings.quickReplies.guide.label: Guide reply
settings.quickReplies.impersonate.label: Impersonate
settings.quickReplies.label: Quick replies
settings.quickReplies.postOnly.descripti: Add persona message without triggering a reply.
settings.quickReplies.postOnly.label: Post only

settings.sections.adminAccess.title: Admin Access

settings.sections.appStyle.description: Theme family, color scheme, accent, and app chrome controls.
settings.sections.appStyle.title: App Style

settings.sections.conversationDisplay.de: Conversation layout and shared message text presentation.
settings.sections.conversationTheme.desc: Conversation-mode background gradient by color scheme.
settings.sections.dangerZone.componentDe: Permanently clear selected categories of local data. Professor Mari is always preserved.
settings.sections.dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
settings.sections.gameAssets.componentDe: Open existing asset folders, import new files, and refresh the server manifest.
settings.sections.gameAssets.description: Asset folders for music, ambience, sprites, and backgrounds.
settings.sections.gameAssets.title: Game Assets
settings.sections.gamePlayback.title: Game Playback
settings.sections.gamePresentation.descr: Game VN art scale and dialogue display.
settings.sections.gamePresentation.title: Game Presentation
settings.sections.imageGeneration.compon: Set image canvas defaults and tune prompt style profiles.
settings.sections.imageGeneration.descri: Image canvas defaults and style profiles.
settings.sections.imageGeneration.title: Image Generation
settings.sections.inputEditing.descripti: Message input behavior and fast edit controls.
settings.sections.inputEditing.title: Input & Editing
settings.sections.messageTools.title: Message Tools
settings.sections.notifications.descript: Notification sounds and background notifications by mode.
settings.sections.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.sections.overallGenerations.com: Choose behavior shared by image and video generation.
settings.sections.overallGenerations.des: Shared behavior for image and video generation requests.
settings.sections.personalExtensions.des: Sandboxed extension drafts authored by Professor Mari.
settings.sections.profileMarinara.descri: Restore full profiles or import individual Marinara files.
settings.sections.profileMarinara.title: Profile & Marinara
settings.sections.promptOverrides.descri: Reusable image and video prompt templates.
settings.sections.promptOverrides.title: Prompt Overrides
settings.sections.responses.description: How replies arrive, save, and paginate.
settings.sections.responses.title: Responses
settings.sections.roleplayMessages.descr: Roleplay bubbles, avatars, sprite scale, and message opacity.
settings.sections.roleplayMessages.title: Roleplay Messages
settings.sections.sillyTavernImport.comp: Bring over characters, chats, presets, and lorebooks from SillyTavern files.
settings.sections.sillyTavernImport.desc: Bring over characters, chats, presets, and lorebooks.
settings.sections.textRules.title: Text Rules
settings.sections.textScale.description: Fonts, display size, chat text colors, and legibility controls.
settings.sections.textScale.title: Text & Scale
settings.sections.themeLibrary.component: Create, import, activate, edit, export, or remove custom CSS themes.
settings.sections.themeLibrary.descripti: Synced themes and custom theme CSS.
settings.sections.themeLibrary.title: Theme Library
settings.sections.updates.componentDescr: Check this install, apply supported updates, or force-refresh the web shell.
settings.sections.updates.title: Updates
settings.sections.videoGeneration.compon: Set default clip lengths and edit reusable video prompts for Game, Gallery, and Calls.
settings.sections.videoGeneration.descri: Video duration, clip behavior, and reusable video settings.
settings.sections.videoGeneration.title: Video Generation
settings.tabs.addons.label: Addons
settings.tabs.advanced.description: Admin access, updates, tools, backups, and danger zone.
settings.tabs.advanced.label: Advanced
settings.tabs.appearance.description: Theme, chat display, art, motion, and backgrounds.
settings.tabs.appearance.label: Appearance
settings.tabs.general.description: App behavior, responses, input, and playback.
settings.tabs.general.label: General
settings.tabs.generations.label: Generations
settings.tabs.imports.description: Imports, asset folders, and data transfer.
settings.tabs.imports.label: Imports
settings.transfer.exportProfile.descript: Native creates a Marinara profile JSON for restoring your data in Marinara. If the JSON would be too large, Marinara will offer a profile ZIP instead.
settings.transfer.exportProfile.title: Export Profile
settings.transfer.fullBackup.help: Download a full backup as a .zip archive (storage snapshots + avatars, sprites, backgrounds, gallery, fonts, knowledge sources). Import Profile can restore the zip directly. The raw folders are for manual recovery.
ui.faq.description: The recurring setup, model, Game Mode, image, and agent questions people keep asking.
ui.faq.docsFallbackPath: the docs folder inside your Marinara install folder
ui.faq.startHere: Start here before you go hunting through Discord logs.
ui.faq.tapQuestion: Tap a question to reveal the answer.
